hiddenAbility.nerf: When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Speed reduced to x1.5
When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Turns reduced to x2

common.lore: The warmth of spring. Its fire does not scorch the world, but stirs it awake, melting snow and kindling new life. The cold loosens its hold as it passes, and the land is renewed by heat and light.

Emerged to give shape to will. When the world was still new, it granted resolve to humanity, allowing action, choice, and determination to take form. Its presence steels the spirit of the gods of time and space.
